instrument.research_symbol: NQ.v.0 (Databento GLBX.MDP3, volume-rolled continuous front month)

splits.holdout_policy: RUN ONCE on the configuration frozen by Stages 1-3. Sentinel data/research/.es_nq_holdout_done prevents re-runs. Result reported regardless of outcome.

bias_weights_preregistered.policy: NEVER fit. Alternative weights may be tested only AFTER primary validation completes, as separately-ledgered hypotheses.

outcome_definition.primary: direction_real = sign(rth_close - rth_open), where rth_open is the Open of the 09:30 ET five-minute bar and rth_close is the last RTH bar Close. Exact-zero sessions excluded from the accuracy denominator.
outcome_definition.secondary_reported_only: Sessions with |rth_close/rth_open - 1| < 0.15% marked FLAT and excluded; FLAT fraction reported. Never gates.

input_definitions.overnight: ret = (last 1-min Close at/before 09:25 ET) / (prior session 16:00 RTH close) - 1. Score = clip(ret / 0.003, -1, +1). Score forced to 0 on contract-roll days (continuous series is spliced, not back-adjusted; cross-contract returns are artifacts).
input_definitions.vix: Data through prior session close only. dir5 = sign(VIX[t-1] - VIX[t-6]); rel = sign(VIX[t-1] - SMA20(VIX)[t-1]). Score = 0.5*(-dir5) + 0.5*(-rel). Falling / below-MA VIX is bullish NQ.
input_definitions.hurst: Variance-ratio Hurst (same math as universe_sweep._rolling_hurst) on the trailing 20 daily RTH-close log returns ending at t-1. ctx = sign(sum of last 5 daily log returns through t-1). Score = +ctx if H > 0.55; -ctx if H < 0.45; else 0.
input_definitions.international: Nikkei: same-calendar-date close (Tokyo session completes ~01:00-02:00 ET, strictly pre-09:30) close-to-close sign; 0 on Tokyo holidays. DAX: prior COMPLETED session close-to-close sign (DAX is still open at 09:30 ET; stale by design, documented). Score = 0.5*nikkei + 0.5*dax.

lookahead_cutoffs.calendar: event dates known in advance; live tone uses only pre-09:30 releases
lookahead_cutoffs.international: Nikkei same-day close (pre-02:00 ET); DAX prior session close

amendments.title: Economic calendar input degraded for backtests (2018-2025)
amendments.reason: No source exists in the system for historical consensus-vs-actual economic surprise tone (Forex Factory scraper is today-only; Alpha Vantage and FRED carry no historical consensus).
amendments.backtest_treatment: Input 2 contributes 0 to direction. High-impact event days (FOMC decision, CPI release, Employment Situation release; dates from data/es_nq/econ_calendar_2018_2026.json - FOMC hand-tabulated from Fed public schedules, CPI and NFP from FRED release-dates API) apply a 0.75 multiplier to bias confidence. Effective directional weights are the remaining four renormalized.
amendments.live_treatment: 2026+ live path uses data/calendar_fetcher.py for real event tone with the full pre-registered weight.
amendments.disclosure: This live-vs-backtest asymmetry is disclosed in every validation stage report.

structure_gate.levels: PDH/PDL (prior session RTH high/low), ONH/ONL (overnight 18:00->09:30 ET high/low)
structure_gate.sweep: bar exceeds level by >= 0.1% then a Close back inside the level within 3 five-minute bars; extreme = min/max across sweep..reclaim bars
structure_gate.confirmation: after reclaim: price touches session VWAP (typical-price cumulative, identical to sovereign/futures/scalp_strategy.compute_indicators), then one bar closing in bias direction with Volume > 1.2x rolling-20-bar average; must complete before 12:00 ET
structure_gate.execution: entry next bar Open + 0.25 tick slippage; stop = sweep extreme -/+ 2 ticks (0.5 tick slippage on stop fills); T1 = 1.5x stop distance (half off, stop to breakeven effective from the NEXT bar after the T1 fill), T2 = 2.5x; if stop and target are both touched within one bar, STOP fills first (conservative); flat by 15:55 ET
structure_gate.roll_days: excluded from structure-gate trading (backtest and live)

bias_only_baseline: If bias != NEUTRAL: enter at the 09:35 ET bar Open in bias direction, stop = entry -/+ 1.0 x daily ATR(14), same T1/T2 ratios and cost model, flat 15:55. This is the Stage-2 comparison arm.

sizing_ladder.rules: trade1 probe; trade2 press if probe won else pullback; trade3 runner only if trades 1 AND 2 both won; max 3 trades; hard daily stop at -1.5% of account
sizing_ladder.stage3_comparison: adaptive ladder vs flat 0.5% per trade, identical trades

cost_model.robustness_reporting: Stages 2/3 also reported under 1.0 tick/side + $0.74 RT (informational, never gates)

validation_stages.stage1: ESNQ-BIAS-01: OOS 2021-2023 directional accuracy on non-NEUTRAL calls. Primary null: permute realized direction labels across OOS sessions, 10000 draws, seed 7. Secondary (reported): circular-shift null. Gate: accuracy > 50% AND p < 0.05, else KILL (paper runner permanently blocked).
validation_stages.stage2: ESNQ-GATE-02: structure-gate trades vs bias_only baseline, net R/trade. Null: random same-direction entries drawn from the eligible 09:35-12:00 bar pool per bias-fired session, identical exit machinery, stop distances resampled from real trades. Gate improves with p < 0.05 else gate dropped.
validation_stages.stage3: ESNQ-SIZE-03: adaptive vs flat sizing on identical trades, session-level Sharpe. Null: within-session trade-order permutation re-laddered, 10000 draws, plus bootstrap CI. Adaptive ships only if diff > 0 with p < 0.05, else flat.
validation_stages.stage4: ESNQ-HOLDOUT-04: frozen configuration on 2024-2025, run once, report whatever it says.
validation_stages.both_sides_rule: Every stage reports condition-met AND condition-not-met cohorts (the combat-rules rule).

ledger: Entries appended to data/agent/hypothesis_ledger.json (canonical path; the brief's data/research/ path is a known discrepancy, resolved here). Full machine results to data/research/es_nq_validation.json.
